forest-h3.title: Thick Underbrush
text: Dense brambles crowd the path here, tugging at your clothes.
The forest feels tighter, more watchful.

bushes.roomDesc: A cluster of thorny bushes tangles together like a wall.
bushes.lookText: Thorny and dense. You could push through but it would cost you.

roots.roomDesc: Thick roots knot together beneath the bushes, hiding the ground.
roots.lookText: Something is wedged between them — too deep to reach.

glint.roomDesc: Something glints faintly between the roots.
glint.lookText: You reach for it. Your fingers brush something cold. But it's gone.

rock.roomText: A smooth rock sits among the roots, worn by water long dried up.
